-  kDNSServiceErr_NATPortMappingUnsupported 

Global Variable# kDNSServiceErr_NATPortMappingUnsupported

iOS 10.0+iPadOS 10.0+Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.12+tvOS 10.0+visionOS 1.0+watchOS 3.0+

```
var kDNSServiceErr_NATPortMappingUnsupported: Int { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/dnssd/kDNSServiceErr_NATPortMappingUnsupported#Discussion)

The NAT gateway doesn’t support PCP, NAT-PMP or UPnP.
